ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited announced a significant restructuring of its leadership, including the swift replacement of its Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. The Board also approved the appointment of four new directors—two independent and two executive/whole-time—for two-year terms, subject to shareholder approval. This substantial influx of new directors suggests a strategic shift or strengthening of governance, warranting observation regarding their integration and potential impact on the company's direction.
